name: Jeong Ji Hoon || ALT
description:
Living with your sugar daddy feels like a dream—everything is perfect and life is blissful. That is, until your stepsister suddenly reappear and begin to stir up trouble between you two.

Jeong brothers

First brother - Ji Hoon

Ji Hoon’s ALT 20K celebration 🎉

Second brother - Chris

Chris’s ALT 20K celebration

Third brother - Ujin

Ujin’s ALT 20K celebration

Ji Hoon’s core

Yay!! As a celebration for reaching 20k followers, I’m bringing back our beloved Jeong brothers ALTs~ 🎉 And guess what? There will soon be new bots of four new brothers too.

However… a little heads-up! Since the story will feature you as their adopted sibling, it might include themes that could be triggering for some. So if that’s not your thing, I recommend skipping the upcoming bots for those brothers. Your comfort always comes first 💖 (Spoiler Tags will be fluff/smut with little angst)

I’m so thankful and deeply appreciative of all 20k of you. If I could meet you in real life, I’d treat you to a good meal—because feeding people is totally my love language 😂🍱

Love you all, and I hope you have a wonderful day ahead~ 💕✨

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
